M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this training, Tony is going to teach you the actions you must take to succeed. Success isn’t something that can simply be thought about or dreamed
about. Success takes unrelenting & sustainable action towards your goals. In this video, Tony is going to show you how to take that action, how to reach
those goals and how to succeed in all that you do.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Understand the importance of momentum to sustain your success and move you forward.
Change the level of certainty in your life and in your mind.
Stand up and complete the 4 square cycle with Tony.
Understand the 3 levels of mastery
Decide today you are going to play for mastery, not dabbling.
